headline: Final sign-off polish steadies mobile filters, search rows, CTA wrapping, and focus states across Magazine, result, and My Trips before public beta sharing.
notes: Magazine filter rows and helper controls now behave more cleanly on narrow phones, with snap-friendly chips and steadier full-width CTA stacks.
Result and sticky route actions keep more consistent tap targets and cleaner wrapping on the smallest breakpoints.
My Trips now handles quick filters, search controls, and first-fold actions with safer small-screen density and more readable button balance.
This pass is aimed at final release sign-off: fewer tiny friction points, stronger interaction clarity, and cleaner multilingual mobile rhythm.
